layout.subtitle: Manage your account, player profile, and creator profile in one place.

player.title: Player profile
player.nicknameLength: Nickname must be between 3 and 60 characters.
player.bioPlaceholder: Tell others a bit about you (max 2000 characters).
player.bioTooLong: Bio must be at most 2000 characters.
player.openProfileNewTab: View public player profile (opens in new tab)
player.noPlayerBody: Your account is not linked to a player profile yet.

banner.presetHint: Pick a free banner from the list
banner.customEmpty: Wider images fit the header better
banner.dropzonePrimary: Click or drop an image here
banner.invalidFileType: Unsupported image type. Use JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, or SVG.
banner.lockedHint: You have a saved custom banner, but it is inactive until custom banners are enabled on your account. Your preset is shown publicly instead.
banner.manifestLoadError: Could not load the banner list; only the default preset is available until this is fixed.

creator.title: Creator profile
creator.displayNameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.
creator.displayNameTooLong: Name must be at most 100 characters.
creator.bioPlaceholder: Tell others a bit about you as a creator (max 2000 characters).
creator.bioTooLong: Bio must be at most 2000 characters.
creator.uploadConditionsPlaceholder: When and how you accept chart uploads (max 2000 characters). Shown to visitors on your public profile.
creator.uploadConditionsTooLong: Upload conditions must be at most 2000 characters.

curationBadges.empty: No curation types on credited levels yet.

creator.aliasesHint: Up to {{max}} names for search. Cannot match your display name or any other creator’s name or alias (case-insensitive).
creator.aliasesTooShort: Each alias must be at least 2 characters
creator.openPublicProfileNewTab: View public creator profile (opens in new tab)
creator.noCreatorBody: Your account is not linked to a creator profile yet.
creator.loadErrorBody: Try again later or open your public profile.
